default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Refine pitch deck for upcoming investor meetings, focusing on key messaging and slide structure.](https://fathom.video/share/sDhPGxTrds7LHaEwgj3u8fsVsfmZurCm?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Emphasize traction and impressive client logos over revenue numbers](https://fathom.video/share/sDhPGxTrds7LHaEwgj3u8fsVsfmZurCm?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Simplify messaging around marketing complexity and GrowthX's solution](https://fathom.video/share/sDhPGxTrds7LHaEwgj3u8fsVsfmZurCm?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)
  - [Structure narrative to lead investors to conclusions about market potential](https://fathom.video/share/sDhPGxTrds7LHaEwgj3u8fsVsfmZurCm?tab=summary&timestamp=28.0)
  - [Include brief product demo to showcase capabilities without diving too deep](https://fathom.video/share/sDhPGxTrds7LHaEwgj3u8fsVsfmZurCm?tab=summary&timestamp=36.0)

## Topics

### Pitch Deck Structure

  - [Team slide: Focus on founders and key builders, emphasizing past roles/companies](https://fathom.video/share/sDhPGxTrds7LHaEwgj3u8fsVsfmZurCm?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Logo snapshot: Include recent additions (Bubble, Base10, Lovable)](https://fathom.video/share/sDhPGxTrds7LHaEwgj3u8fsVsfmZurCm?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [Journey/traction: Show growth without overemphasizing specific metrics](https://fathom.video/share/sDhPGxTrds7LHaEwgj3u8fsVsfmZurCm?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)
  - [Problem statement: Marketing complexity, need for outcomes vs tools](https://fathom.video/share/sDhPGxTrds7LHaEwgj3u8fsVsfmZurCm?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Solution: Forward-deployed experts + AI workflows/agents](https://fathom.video/share/sDhPGxTrds7LHaEwgj3u8fsVsfmZurCm?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
  - [Deployment model: Customer-centric view (e.g. Augment case study)](https://fathom.video/share/sDhPGxTrds7LHaEwgj3u8fsVsfmZurCm?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)
  - [Expansion path: Visual representation of additional use cases/jobs to be done](https://fathom.video/share/sDhPGxTrds7LHaEwgj3u8fsVsfmZurCm?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
  - [Scalability: Address how to reach 2000+ customers (separate from expansion)](https://fathom.video/share/sDhPGxTrds7LHaEwgj3u8fsVsfmZurCm?tab=summary&timestamp=918.0)

### Messaging Strategy

  - [Meet market where they are: Emphasize rapid changes in marketing capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/sDhPGxTrds7LHaEwgj3u8fsVsfmZurCm?tab=summary&timestamp=2359.0)
  - [Highlight need for expert guidance and execution support](https://fathom.video/share/sDhPGxTrds7LHaEwgj3u8fsVsfmZurCm?tab=summary&timestamp=2379.0)
  - [Position GrowthX as solving overwhelm from tools/agencies](https://fathom.video/share/sDhPGxTrds7LHaEwgj3u8fsVsfmZurCm?tab=summary&timestamp=2200.0)
  - [Frame content as "mouth of the river" for broader GTM potential](https://fathom.video/share/sDhPGxTrds7LHaEwgj3u8fsVsfmZurCm?tab=summary&timestamp=2662.0)
  - [Avoid positioning as competing directly with specific tools (e.g. Clay, Customer.io)](https://fathom.video/share/sDhPGxTrds7LHaEwgj3u8fsVsfmZurCm?tab=summary&timestamp=2798.0)

### Product Demo Approach

  - [Brief 3-minute flythrough of key features](https://fathom.video/share/sDhPGxTrds7LHaEwgj3u8fsVsfmZurCm?tab=summary&timestamp=2542.0)
  - [Have multiple tabs open to quickly showcase different aspects](https://fathom.video/share/sDhPGxTrds7LHaEwgj3u8fsVsfmZurCm?tab=summary&timestamp=2558.0)
  - [Focus on impressing without getting bogged down in details](https://fathom.video/share/sDhPGxTrds7LHaEwgj3u8fsVsfmZurCm?tab=summary&timestamp=2570.0)

### Investor-Specific Considerations

  - [Tailor depth based on investor's background (e.g. more high-level for Altimeter's Jamin Ball)](https://fathom.video/share/sDhPGxTrds7LHaEwgj3u8fsVsfmZurCm?tab=summary&timestamp=3044.0)
  - [Be prepared to address questions about scalability and services component](https://fathom.video/share/sDhPGxTrds7LHaEwgj3u8fsVsfmZurCm?tab=summary&timestamp=2948.0)
  - [Leverage team's connections/reputation where applicable (e.g. Marcel's relationship with ClickHouse CEO)](https://fathom.video/share/sDhPGxTrds7LHaEwgj3u8fsVsfmZurCm?tab=summary&timestamp=3182.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel: Refine slides 1-3, work on slides 4-5, conceptualize slide 6](https://fathom.video/share/sDhPGxTrds7LHaEwgj3u8fsVsfmZurCm?tab=summary&timestamp=3192.0)
  - [Daniel: Develop expansion path, scalability, and ICP journey slides](https://fathom.video/share/sDhPGxTrds7LHaEwgj3u8fsVsfmZurCm?tab=summary&timestamp=3215.0)
  - [Create customer-centric deployment model slide (potentially using Augment as example)](https://fathom.video/share/sDhPGxTrds7LHaEwgj3u8fsVsfmZurCm?tab=summary&timestamp=3262.0)
  - [Prepare concise product demo for pitch meetings](https://fathom.video/share/sDhPGxTrds7LHaEwgj3u8fsVsfmZurCm?tab=summary&timestamp=2542.0)
  - [Review final deck to ensure cohesive narrative and appropriate depth for Monday's meetings](https://fathom.video/share/sDhPGxTrds7LHaEwgj3u8fsVsfmZurCm?tab=summary&timestamp=3278.0)

action_items.description: Develop slide 6 (meeting market where they are)
Prepare for Altimeter call, focusing on high-level pitch (cloud companies, technical audience)
Create slides on expansion path, scalability, ICP journey
Develop slide 7 (deployment model) using Augment code as customer example
